title: viola × neilreichiana
intro: Viola × neilreichiana, also known as the hybrid pansy or viola hybrid, is a cross between Viola sororia and Viola riviniana, resulting in a unique and attractive flowering plant. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × neilreichiana include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Viola × neilreichiana can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin conditions.
